## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes
- [ ] New code has tests (or you explain why not)
- [ ] `resonant-archive --help` still runs cleanly
- [ ] One concern per PR (not bundling unrelated changes)
- [ ] No new heavy dependencies without discussion in an issue first
